title: Idling Stop System Failure Diagnostic Table by Symptom

crossRefs.label: (Idling Stop System warning light does not turn off)
(Idling Stop Indicator Light/Idling Stop System Warning Light does not illuminate)

blocks.text: Idling Stop System Failure Diagnostic Table by Symptom

rows.text: 1. Idling Stop System Operation Inspection do 2. Failure Diagnosis by Symptom (Idling stop system failure diagnosis) do
Idling stop system warning light (orange) stays on and does not turn off
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom (Idling Stop System warning light does not turn off) do

refs.label: (Idling Stop System warning light does not turn off)

rows.text: Idling stop indicator light (green)/Idling stop system warning light (orange) does not illuminate
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom (Idling Stop Indicator Light/Idling Stop System Warning Light does not illuminate) do

refs.label: (Idling Stop Indicator Light/Idling Stop System Warning Light does not illuminate)

rows.text: 1. Perform master power function check Small leaks in the following parts will not keep the airtight condition and will shorten idle stop time. Check the following parts for leaks. Check valve (built into the vacuum hose) Vacuum hoses and pipes Vacuum tubing (between master power vacuum hose and master power negative pressure sensor) Master Power Rod seal or secondary cup on master cylinder *NOTE: Hermetic condition (magnitude of leakage) of the above components and idle stop events. A large leakage will result in a non-stop idle event. Small leaks result in events with short idle stop times. 2. Failure Diagnosis by Symptom (Idling stop system failure diagnosis) do
